data.body: BLOCKER on 21dd live-eval: created bug 2340-1b72-109a-43d7 (discovered_from 21dd) for the dash/dot round-trip in calibrate_criterion->run_case->_criterion_id that makes 'rebar criteria eval <project.criterion>' fail with 'no eval solver' for any namespaced project criterion. Fix is in src/rebar, which 21dd DD-3 forbids. 21dd offline calibration (corpus+tests+metric-math) is complete & green; only the operator-attested live run is blocked. Options: (A) fix bug + early-land to main + rebase stack + run live eval (correct, but expands scope into shared core code the epic excluded); (B) descope live-eval, force-close 21dd unsigned per its own uncalibrated fallback, track fix via 2340. Will push 21dd offline change + do f698 (needed regardless), then surface A/B to user.
